Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Valinhall Gate]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — A Valinhall Gate can be cut open.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — The Valinhall Gate is a location Simon can retreat toward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — A Valinhall Gate can only be held open by a full Traveler using his assigned Dragon’s Fang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Denner can slice open a Valinhall Gate with his sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — A Valinhall Gate is a portal used for movement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Valinhall Gates only go in one direction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Simon attempts to cut a Valinhall Gate using Azura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Simon sliced downward into a Valinhall Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Indirial uses his blade to slice open a Gate in midair and walks through the Valinhall Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Simon can use Azura to open a Valinhall Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Simon can cut a Valinhall Gate.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Indirial can cut open a Valinhall Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — There is residue of an old Valinhall Gate near Leah's camp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Opening a Valinhall Gate takes a long time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Valinhall Gates can be opened from anywhere outside and always lead to the House's entry hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — A normal Valinhall Gate is opened by a Traveler slicing it from top to bottom, creating a white-edged swirling doorway.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Simon attempts to cut a Valinhall Gate in his tent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — The Valinhall Gate can be open.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Two Valinhall Gates opened simultaneously in the entry hall.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
